allow: Bash(echo xcodegen not in PATH from WSL:*)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(c[''''sha''''][:7], c[''''commit''''][''''message''''][:80]\) for c in data]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(t[''''path'''']\) for t in data.get\(''''tree'''',[]\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(item[''''path'''']+''''|''''+item[''''type'''']+''''|''''+item.get\(''''sha'''',''''''''\)\) for item in data.get\(''''tree'''',[]\)]")
